description: Jacob and Nick discuss the latest updates in the Solana ecosystem, including the upcoming Radar hackathon starting September 2nd, improvements in transaction instruction limits, and new features in Anchor for custom discriminators.
topic_summary: The episode covers the announcement of the Radar hackathon [t=13:44], the introduction of SIMD160 for static instruction limits [t=92:17], and the support for custom discriminators in Anchor [t=210:64].
